title: Low Contrast Resin
description: Make the resin not look like it came from a mod.
body:
## Description

In the snapshot 24w44a of Minecraft version 1.21.4 new resin blocks and items were added. According to player feedback, the new items are similar to items taken from mods. With this resource pack I solve this problem.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d50fa4f15d191133a39ed16933e4cce57db305ec.jpeg)

![other resin items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/331e5225f4e77961c0cd6b1624f82655039cfa81.png)
